programmes.show_description: Join us for TEXT{ures} launch. Born from Lou's love of hand lettering and her lifelong passion for mixed-media, where marks, textures and layered details tell their own story.
Say goodbye to large frayed colour charts and endless swatching. These PRISM Swatch Cards are the answer to your crafting prayers, the perfect resource to add to your stash!
A garden of papercraft beauty, the Floral Quilling Kit has everything you need to create 3D, quilled flowers, in one easy-to-use set. Discover more with Debby!
Keith is back to celebrate our 4th birthday with his signature mix of quality, quantity, and fun! Enjoy all-day P&P for just £4.95 and fill your basket with birthday treats galore!
HobbyMaker's birthday celebrations are in full swing! Tune in for Debby's discounts and discover brilliant deals, crafty favourites and amazing value.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
Join us for a day of Liberty! Suzie Duncan is with us to launch the latest Liberty collection - Emily Annabelle, alongside her Crossed Floral cushion kits.
Suzanne Campion joins us to demonstrate her beautiful Emily Annabelle Cathedral Window Quilt Kit.
Suzie Duncan brings us a celebration of Liberty inspired projects with the Tulip & Garden Path Bags.
Suzanne Campion is back with two fantastic projects. The Emily Belle inspired Chester Rows Quilt & the Mirliton Cushion.
Join us as we continue our celebration into Liberty and revisit past collections.
Celebrate 4 years of HobbyMaker with Studio Light in this exclusive birthday launch event.
Discover The Floral Stationery Collection by Françoise Read for Woodware. Create layered, textured and beautifully coordinated designs with ease.
Celebrate HobbyMakers' 4th Birthday with a special Deal of the Day exclusive launch from Brother. Don't miss this limited-time offer featuring innovative crafting solutions.
Discover the creativity of Studio Light with Enchanted Fairytale Cutting Dies through inspiring tutorials, expert insights, and imaginative ideas to enhance your crafting journey.

Explore the timeless beauty of William Morris designs, featuring iconic prints inspired by nature, heritage, and craftsmanship.
Delphine Brooks is backing bringing us a beautiful Heron Wallhanging inspired by William Morris.
...Cases Kits: Amber Makes will be bringing us two brand new exclusive William Morris Mug Carry Cases, along with all their previous sell out William Morris kits restocked.
Delphine Brooks is back with another beautiful William Morris inspired make - a reverse applique cushion!
Jason Read from Horn Furniture is here with some brand new William Morris designed craft chairs for your sewing room, available in two sizes.
Finishing our William Morris celebration day with half an hour of William Morris Adjustoform.
Step into a world of fantasy with the NEW Enchanted Cosmic Shimmer silicone moulds - a captivating collection of eight highly detailed designs.
Craft along with Debby Robinson as they reveal fresh ideas, clever techniques, and inspiring tips to bring your next project to life.
If it's toppers with impact you're after then the Hunkydory Whopper Topper Pad range is right up your crafting street. Containing a variety of different themes and styles.
Get ready to celebrate in style with this bumper box packed full of creative essentials! Inside, you'll find a delightful mix of dies, stamps, embellishments, and more.
Step into a world of fantasy with the NEW Enchanted Cosmic Shimmer silicone moulds - a captivating collection of eight highly detailed designs.
Join us for a closer look at Crafter's Companion, featuring demonstrations, tips and ideas to help you create with confidence and style.
Get creative with Hunkydory as you explore inspiring projects, practical guidance, and expert techniques to enhance your crafting skills.
This new collection from Hero Arts is Beary Sweet! Gummy bears, sweetie jars, sweets and more-what more could you want? Packed with playful designs and irresistible charm.
